memberdef.argsstring: (self, float x, float y, float z, float w)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim: NOTE: We use `std::declval()` in the operators below because libclang 18 in our binding generator is bugged and chokes on decltyping `a.x` and such. TODO fix this when we update libclang.
assuming this is a point represented in homogeneous 4D coordinates, returns the point as 3D-vector

Generated from: MR::Vector4f Aliases: Matrix4_float_VectorType
four-dimensional vector
